DHCPv6IANAConfig.description:
IA_NA config — address assignment parameters.
Sources come from LanIPv6Config.sources filtered by Na* variants.

max_prefix_len.description: Max prefix length to qualify (e.g., 64 means prefixes with len <= 64 are used).

pool_end.description: Host part range end (optional, defaults to subnet max)

pool_start.description: Host part range start (suffix value, e.g., 0x100 = 256)

DHCPv6IAPDConfig.description:
IA_PD config — prefix delegation parameters.
Sources come from LanIPv6Config.sources filtered by Pd* variants.

delegate_prefix_len.description: Prefix length to delegate to clients (e.g., 60, 64).

DHCPv6ServerConfig.description:
DHCPv6 server config — parameters only.
Prefix sources are defined in LanIPv6Config.sources (filtered by service_kind).

ia_pd.description: IA_PD: prefix delegation to downstream routers

DNSRedirectRule.description: 用于定义 DNS 重定向的单元配置

LanIPv6SourceConfig.description:
Flat 6-variant enum representing all source configurations for LAN IPv6 services.
Combines service type (Ra/Na/Pd) and source type (Static/Pd) into a single flat enum.
